chatMessages.content: Welcome to the galaxy Beta Test, alright! The Galactic Federation welcomes you to Space Station, wishes you a great success in your journey, and appreciates to have you in our ranks. Remember, completing tasks inside your Commander Academy (Station Roadmap) is vital to stabilize the station, each task has claimable rewards with some Space Gold rewarded too! Also, please feel free to send us your thoughts and feedback via the Suggestion Station located in your Settings tab. Good luck, Commander!

logs: --- SECURE TELEMETRY SCAN ---
No active orbit guards or garrison troops detected at target colony.
Complete layout telemetry logged with zero drone losses.
--- COMBAT CYCLE 1 INITIATED ---
Attackers throw 936 megawatt laser channels into target coordinates.
Defenders are being attacked under siege. Their offensive HP does not count; only their defense HP (1,146 total DEF) is channeled into 1,147 retaliatory counter-firepower.
Attacker casualties: 15 Interceptor, 25 Assault Drone, 3 Disrupter, 10 Matter Extractor, 1 Missile Launcher.
Defender casualties: 14 Interceptor, 22 Assault Drone, 2 Disrupter, 9 Matter Extractor, 4 Missile Launcher.
🛡️ [Tactical Deflection Force] Attacker had 36.1% HP advantage! Survival security field guaranteed that at least 36.1% of original squads survive.
🛡️ [Tactical Deflection Force] Defender had 43.4% HP advantage! Survival security field guaranteed that at least 43.4% of original squads survive.

[Tactical Medical Bay] Offside carrier teams salvaged and re-launched: 1 Interceptor for the Attacker.

Hostile garrison detected: 671 defending HP.

Orbit guards identified scout telemetry and initiated railguards.

Full tactical satellite telemetry was successfully beamed to moonbase before demolition.
